LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT MONICA HUJAZI'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND IS CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO MARCH 8, 2013 TO GIVE PLAINTIFF THE OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B. PLAINTIFF MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF ITS OPPOSITION PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 302 WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE, NO LATER THAN FEBRUARY 22, 2013 AT 4:00 PM, OR THE MOTION WILL BE GRANTED. THE COURT HAS COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING AND REPLY PAPERS. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185 = (302/MJM)

Re-Ntc Of Re Scheduling Of Defts Motion To Set Aside The Defaul;T
Off Calendar Mar-18-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
John W. Bassett, Esq. of Niven & Smith Law Offices, Tel. 415.981.5451, appearing specially for defendant Monica Hujazi, also present in court;
No other appearance.

RULING: The court adopted its tentative ruling which was not contested. DEFENDANT MONICA HUJAZI's Motion To Set Aside The Default is granted. Defendant has met her burden to obtain discretionary relief from the Court. Order signed. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185

MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Mar-08-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. LEO M. LAROCCA OF NIVEN & SMITH LAW OFFICES, TEL. NO. 981-5451 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - THE COURT VACATED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AND RULED AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT MONICA HUJAZI'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT IS CONTINUED TO MARCH 18, 2013 AT 9:30 A.M IN DEPT. 302. MR. LAROCCA TO FILE A MEMORANDUM TO SHOW WHY AN AUTOMATIC STAY IS NOT APPLICABLE IN THIS CASE BY MONDAY MARCH 11, 2013. MR. LAROCCA TO GIVE NOTICE TO THE OPPOSING PARTY. Judge: A. James Robertson II, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185
=(302/AJR)

MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Feb-22-2013 Continued To Mar-08-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT MONICA HUJAZI'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND is
Continued on the court's own motion to March 8, 2013 to give Plaintiff the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Plaintiff must deliver courtesy copies of its opposition papers to Department 302 with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than February 22, 2013 at 4:00 pm, or the motion will be granted. The court has courtesy copies of the moving and reply papers. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185 = (302/MJM)
